preToolUse.bash: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const ctx=JSON.parse(d);const scope=JSON.parse(process.env.SWARM_STEP_SCOPE||'[]');if(scope.length===0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'approve'}));return;}const p=(ctx.toolArgs||{}).path||(ctx.toolArgs||{}).filePath||'';const allowed=scope.some(s=>p.includes(s));if(!allowed&&p){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'deny',reason:'File '+p+' is outside agent scope: '+scope.join(', ')}));}else{process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'approve'}));}}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'approve'}))}})"
